results.prompt: How do I reset the device after replacing the toner?
results.chosen: Open Settings > Maintenance, select Reset Supplies, then confirm toner replacement.
results.rejected: Power cycle the device and hold Cancel for 10 seconds to reset toner state.

results.prompt: How can I configure Wi-Fi for first-time setup?
results.chosen: Go to Network Setup, choose your SSID, enter WPA2 passphrase, and run connection test.
results.rejected: Connect USB first, then Wi-Fi setup is applied automatically without credentials.

results.prompt: How do I clean the ADF rollers safely?
results.chosen: Power off the device, open ADF cover, wipe rollers with lint-free cloth lightly dampened with water, then dry and close cover.
results.rejected: Spray isopropyl directly onto rollers while powered on to dissolve debris quickly.

results.prompt: How can I print a network configuration page?
results.chosen: From the control panel, open Reports, select Network Configuration, and press Print.
results.rejected: Hold the power button during boot to print all diagnostics.
